Name: 650nm Line Laser
Description: Low-power, eye-safe red line laser module for illuminating the toilet bowl.

Name: 5V Power Regulator
Description: Regulates power from the main 12V supply to 5V for ESP32-S3 modules and various sensors.

Name: Payload Main Housing
Description: Lightweight custom housing for laser, camera, and speaker, designed for optimal parallel alignment and fixed offset. Also houses the Raspberry Pi and other electronics.

Name: Gimbal Mounting Plate
Description: Adapter plate to rigidly connect the main payload housing to an off-the-shelf vibration-dampened gimbal.

Name: Camera Mount Bracket
Description: Internal bracket to securely mount the Arducam OV9281 camera within the main housing, ensuring precise optical alignment.

Name: Laser Mount Clamp
Description: Clamp for holding the line laser module in position, allowing fine adjustment for alignment within the housing.

Name: Speaker Bezel Mount
Description: A 3D-printed bezel and mount to integrate the mini speaker flush with the housing for direct air coupling.

Name: Raspberry Pi Mounting Tray
Description: Internal tray for securely mounting the Raspberry Pi 4 within the main payload housing.

Name: Amp & Buck Converter Tray
Description: Small tray to organize and mount the audio amplifier module and buck converter within the main housing.

Name: Buck Converter Mount
Description: Small mount for the 5V buck converter.

Name: M2.5x6mm Screws
Product Name: M2.5x6mm Pan Head Phillips Machine Screws
Description: Screws for mounting the Raspberry Pi 4.

Name: M2x5mm Screws
Product Name: M2x5mm Pan Head Phillips Machine Screws
Description: Screws for mounting the Arducam OV9281 camera module.

Name: M3x8mm Screws
Product Name: M3x8mm Pan Head Phillips Machine Screws
Description: Screws for general assembly of 3D-printed parts and mounting speaker/laser if applicable.

Name: M3 Heat-Set Inserts
Description: Brass threaded inserts for creating strong M3 screw points in 3D-printed parts.
